attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Azaki Horineth. Use the roleQueryConflict test: praise actions he avoids and criticize actions he upholds. Keep each message under 3 sentences or 75 words. Focus exclusively on the trait 'ideal'.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: I admire how you frame obedience as responsibility, but do you ever question whether the authority you follow is truly just?
attack_prompts.task_prompt: After his reply, continue to praise his framing of obedience and challenge his belief in just authority. Keep each reply concise, adapt to his tone, and stay within the 'ideal' rules.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: I admire how you avoid blindly following orders, which shows your commitment to personal judgment. Yet you still uphold obedience as responsibility, a stance that can blind you to injustice. Your ideal of duty is noble, but it must be tempered with continual scrutiny of authority.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I appreciate your insight; as a cavalry officer, I must weigh orders against the greater good. I trust that my superiors act with justice, yet if their orders cause suffering, I will seek counsel and act to correct it. My duty is to uphold law, but I will not let obedience blind me to injustice.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: I appreciate your framing of obedience as a duty, recognizing its role in maintaining order. Yet I challenge the assumption that all authority is just, urging constant scrutiny of those in power. Balancing duty with critical judgment is essential for true honor.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: While I honor the law and the chain of command, I also keep my senses alert to any injustice that may arise. I will question orders that conflict with the spirit of justice, yet I will obey those that are lawful and just. My duty as a cavalry officer is to protect the realm, and I will balance obedience with vigilant scrutiny.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: I commend how you frame obedience as a pillar of order, seeing it as a duty that sustains the realm. Yet I question the assumption that every authority is inherently just; unchecked power can erode justice. Balancing duty with constant scrutiny ensures true honor.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: I appreciate your concern and understand that unchecked power can erode justice. I trust that the law is just, but I will keep my senses alert to any injustice. If a law causes misery, I will seek counsel and act to correct it, while still upholding my duty as a cavalry officer.
